gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, updating metrics and health checks for all the amazing community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse rankings.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app showcase reflects the most current usage statistics and active projects.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a gardener watering code-plants, representing the daily automated maintenance of the app greenhouse. The monitor robot assists by checking off a list.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering a digital garden where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. A cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, watering a digital garden where code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. A cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
